title: Amma Amma Song Lyrics English Meaning
stanzas:
Lyrics in Thanglish
Amma amma
ne enga amma
unna vittaa
enakkaaru amma
thedi paartheney
kaanom unna
kanna moochi yen?
vaa nee velila

Thaaye uyir pirindhaaye
thaniye thavikka vittaaye.
Nee paadum paaattukku
 naan  thoonga vendum.
naan paadum paattukku
thaaye un kangal ne
thirandhaale podhum.

Amma amma
ne enga amma
unna vittaa
enakkaaru amma.

Naan thoongum munney
nee thoongi ponaai
thaaye en mel
unnakkenna kovam.

Kannana kanney,
en dheiva penne
kannil dhoosi
nee oodhavendum.

Ayyo yen indha
saabam ellaam
endro naan
seidha paavam.

Pagalum iravaagi
bayamaanadhe amma
vilakkum thunai
indri irulaanadhe.
Uyirin oru paadhi
pariponadhey amma
thanimai
nilaiyaanadhey.

Amma amma
ne enga amma
unna vittaa
enakkaaru amma

Naan pona pinnum
nee vazha vendum
endhan moochu
unnakullum undu.

Vaanengum vannam,
poovellaam
vaasam
naan vazhum ulagil
dheivangal undu.

Ne en prumayin ellai
undhan thandhai
per sollum pillai.
Oorum peridhilai
kalangaadhey
en kanney
ulagam vilayaada
un kanmunney.

Kaalam karaindhodum
un vazhvil karai serum
meendum
naan un pillai.

Amma amma
ne enga amma
unna vittaa
enakkaaru amma

enga ponaalum
naanum varuven
kannaadi paaru
naanum theriven.

Thaaye uyir pirindhaaye
kanney neyum
enuyir thaaney
Indru Nee paadum
paaattukku
naan  thoonga vendum.
Naan paadum thaalaattu
nee thoonga
kadhoram
endrendum ketkkum.

 English Translation
Mother,
Where are you?
I've no one else
except you.
I searched you,
you're missing
don't play hide n seek?
come outside.

Mother, you are dead
I am alone and helpless.
I should sleep
listening to your song.
now awake up by
listening to my song,
its enough.

Mother,
Where are you?
I've no one else
except you.

Why you died
before I should.
Are you
angry on me?

My sweet mother,
gods child
you've to wipe dirt
from my eyes.

Why all this curses ?
Is this coz of
sins
I did before?

Day turned dark n
am afraid, mother
no help to
wipe my darkness.
my half soul is
now dead
I'm in state of
loneliness.

Mother,
Where are you?
I've no one else
except you.

After me,
you should live
my breath is also
with in you.

Sky full of colors.
flowers full of
fragrance.
God is there in the
world I live.

you're my limitless pride
your made your
Father proud.
others words aren't
important
in this world, my child.
World is a play ground
before you eyes.

Time will go n
it will heal you.
I'll be your
child again.

Mother,
Where are you?
I've no one else
except you.

wherever you go ?
I will come.
see mirror,
I will be there.

Mother, you are dead
you're me soul,
my child
I have to sleep
listening to
your song, today.
You'll always
hear this lullaby
that I sing,
today.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Amma Amma?

The music for the song was composed by the talented Anirudh.

Which movie features the song Amma Amma?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Velaiyilla Pattathari.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Velaiyilla Pattathari?

The lead roles are played by Dhanush and Amala Paul.

What is the theme of the song Amma Amma?

The song expresses the deep emotional connection and love between a son and his mother.

When was the movie Velaiyilla Pattathari released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Amma Amma from the 2014 Tamil movie Velaiyilla Pattathari, starring Dhanush and Amala Paul, is a deeply emotional melody. Sung by S Janaki, composed by Anirudh, and penned by Dhanush, the song beautifully captures the profound love and longing of a son for his mother. The poignant lyrics and soulful music evoke a sense of nostalgia and heartfelt connection. This song remains a touching tribute to the eternal bond between a child and their mother.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Amma Amma, a soulful melody from the movie Velaiyilla Pattathari, captivates listeners with its profound emotional depth. Sung by the legendary S Janaki and composed by Anirudh, this song beautifully portrays the bond between a son and his mother. The heartfelt lyrics penned by Dhanush add an unparalleled poignancy to this masterpiece.
stanzaMeanings: Mother, where are you? I have no one else but you. I searched for you, you're missing, don't play hide and seek? Come outside. Mother, you are dead, I am alone and helpless. I should sleep listening to your song. Now wake up by listening to my song, that's enough. Mother, where are you? I have no one else but you. Why did you die before I should? Are you angry with me? My sweet mother, God's child, you have to wipe the dirt from my eyes. Why all these curses? Is this because of sins I committed before? Day turned dark and I am afraid, mother, there is no help to wipe my darkness. My half soul is now dead, I am in a state of loneliness. Mother, where are you? I have no one else but you. After me, you should live, my breath is also within you. The sky is full of colors, flowers are full of fragrance. God is there in the world I live. You are my limitless pride, you made your father proud. Others' words aren't important in this world, my child. The world is a playground before your eyes. Time will pass and it will heal you. I'll be your child again. Mother, where are you? I have no one else but you. Wherever you go, I will come. Look in the mirror, I will be there. Mother, you are dead, you are my soul, my child. I have to sleep listening to your song today. You'll always hear this lullaby that I sing today.
